Blackstar, Mace of Night  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +15 STA: +25 WIS: +20 HP: +100 MANA: +100
SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
Effect: Blessing of the Blackstar (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Blackstar, Mace of Night
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
Effect: Blessing of the Blackstar (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: CLR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Blunt
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Hob
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-10-17 16:32:06
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name

Hello,
51 cleric here,
one of the GM's handed this to me last night at a stormhammer GM event as a reward. it's a downgrade considering i won one of Aged Shissar Apothic Staff 2 days ago at another event, but still nice, anyone know when this procs?

▲ Page top
Very handy
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2003 at 11:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362125226
17 posts
Got this few weeks ago Very nice to melee with. I only have yaulp 5 atm but thats 10mana regen sta regen 23pct haste and 70 to dex and that boosts my dex up to 255 and this thing procs alot a very usefull hammer to have when you bored out of your mind because the group if a good one. I for one hate sitting and doing the Cheal thing.
▲ Page top
On Clerics and Melee =)
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2003 at 12:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790811689
13 posts
For the record, clerics can melee as well as any caster, and better than most =)

In Bastion of Thunder, I've tanked giants before as cleric (emergencies mind you, ie tank went LD). Its really not that hard to chain stun, beat on the mob, and have the shaman/druid chain heal ya. Its not efficient, no, and its not what we're made for, but its possible - and its fun.

With Yaulp VI and a few mana regen buffs (aside from the KEI line - for example BL crack [SP/SD], mod rods, bard song, armor or the zealot, or necro twitches) we regen just as much swinging as we do sitting, and its a LOT more entertaining to go out and wreak havoc with your summoned hammer or this mace than it is sitting on your horse going cheal, cheal, cheal..

in any case, this mace is awesome, and i look forward to getting one to go beat things with =D
▲ Page top
wow I like it
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2002 at 6:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768773427
8 posts
I just won this weapon and its really nice in fact 2 of them dropped.
I did a crit heal that did the group (210) it didnt process a ton but it did process plenty. I do have my epic and its nice being able to melee with a bonus :) looks like a velium mace to me.
I will use this instead of my epic.
cleric~on Drinal~
▲ Page top
very nice
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2002 at 3:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570696495
4 posts
When in a good group I melee and this would make it even easier. With the mana regen we can get these days I rarely sit to med in a good group. With this, I can probably melee with a so so group.

For those who dont like to see a cleric melee, tough! Im FM and I want something to do and if it makes mobs die a bit faster, then you are getting exp faster.

I just hope this drops for us this week.

QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2002 at 1:41 AM Rating: Decent

Hello

This would be usefull to any questing clerics..

▲ Page top
Good proc
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2002 at 1:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252108299
Scholar
73 posts
The advantage that this has over the legs which cast a similar spell (100hp group heal) is that this IS a proc and not a right click. Most right click items have cast times on them, meaning that the cleric can't do anything else during that period of time. Procs, however, have no cast time. This heal will produce almost no agro, neither will the clerics weak meleeing skills. When the cleric is FM, this could be a lot of fun, and at the same time save them from having to cast a heal if a few casters are down a few hundred hp from an AE, but are still around 80%.

Is it insanely useful? No. But it is pretty cool and allows the cleric to have some fun while at fm, while at the same time allowing them to spread some healing around.

Edit--
Forgot to mention that if a cleric had avatar on him this thing would proc a lot more and be even more useful.

Edited, Sat Feb 23 01:22:52 2002
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

# Nov 22 2001 at 8:01 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591765258974
183 posts
Putting it back near the top so you don't have to go searching the post for it.

Increase Hit Points (HP) by 100 (L1)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: Full Group

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 100 feet
Area Effect Range: 100 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: Instant

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: The blessing of the Blackstar surrounds you.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso is surrounded by the blessing of the Blackstar.
▲ Page top
Boon the cleric!
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 9:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250060828
15 posts
Great item, very nice stats. This is definently going to be primary item, and you keep epic in the bag for a free rez..pretty sad..you camped rage for 30 hours just for the effect..hehe. Well if you have a chanter in your party you could boon your cleric. This raises dex by 100, makin you proc like mad. So when cleric is 80m or so he can start whacking mob(be sure to stay out of melee's way..it pisses em off when you get in the way). The cleric (with haste) would proc a ton, so this will heal your group quite efficiently.
And yes, clicking you PoG, thurg, kael, SS, or PoM leggings would be much more effective than that idea. Mine Akkirus' greaves work wonders on groups in small rooms, especially when wizards or druids overnuke.
▲ Page top
Pfft
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2001 at 4:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757859983
20 posts
This weapon would be useful to change out with the epic for the extra HP and +5 resists.

The proc on this weapon is a gimmick and nearly worthless. Or at least I can't think of a real use for it. Melee players really don't want you getting in their way for the pitiful amount of damage from cleric melee. And you will probably get more healing from just standing there and right clicking your britches, or medding.

it hits like a double bastage on crack, yay variety (no sarcasm there!) i think FS morning star is the best looking weapon i ever had, dark ember looks like a poo, i wish it looked like EBM. wraith bone looks poopy too. stuff that beats FSMS look that i have seen: this one amazing nak hammer from chardok, looks like the wvelium 2h hammer look but it's 1hb, the translucent white block on a stick. aslo, cleric epic woot!

#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 02 2001 at 5:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) id love to see the noobies slowly kill you as you spend forever trying to equip this very nice cleric only weapon =)
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 11 2001 at 2:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This post makes no sense. Congratulations.
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 02 2001 at 5:13 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) oh my god you are all complete morons this item would NEVER go to a cleric but you all wuldnt know because your mindless n00bs who have never been to temple of veeshin but i have and im a monk and i have this wepin because all the real players know that a monk should get this item since it has such good stats and stuff and the dmgdly is a good 1hb for a monk and you all should shut-up and die if you think a cleric would get it because you dont have a clue about us high level stuff so bye
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 02 2001 at 5:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) funny, it says CLR under classes. last i checked monk doesn't have a c, l, or an r in it.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 02 2001 at 7:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) or an i or e...........
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 03 2001 at 10:42 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) its pretty obvious this guy is joking...so i don't see why everyone feels the need to correct him. Some people find it funny to mock all the monks who constantly call just about anything good and under a weight of 5 "monk items". just thouht i would point that out.
Nice, but...
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 4:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757381256
26 posts
1st, is a great item.. and grats to those that got it. But for the 100HP Heal.. Wouldn't it be better to get the PoM Legs that RClick for the same effect? As opposed to whackin a mob for 5-10 mins to get a single proc? Just my 2 Coppa worth

▲ Page top
For the love of...
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 9:01 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Are you people just plain retarded or what?

First off, If cleric only dumbasses. Second the stats are better then the cleric epic except for the rez. Btw: this comes from NTov, and if you have this, you more than likely already have the epic. I weild this instead of my epic.

Third, there is not cool looking model, it looks like an ordinary mace. You dont normally go attacking crap in NToV, but its fun to use when doing exp or messing around and whatnot. The effect is a PROC that is 100hp group heal.

BTW: highest level rez in game besides a GM 100% rez is 96% not 97%.
▲ Page top
Thanks for Clarifying
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 12:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750336874
90 posts
So, the proc is actually a 100 hp GROUP heal. OK, that makes a big difference. I would agree with you and other posters that if someone had this and the epic, they'd be better off wielding this during battle, and wielding the epic after the fight. But three questions. First, isn't any form of group heal during a fight a great way to get mobs to aggro on you?? Second, rather than meleeing to get the proc to go off, at this level wouldn't a cleric be better off medding?? Third, how on earth did you determine that the best non GM res is 96% and not 97%?? How do you even detect that small of a difference, and does it really matter??
▲ Page top
RE: Thanks for Clarifying
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 12:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
Answers:

1) No. If you have three parties beating on a monster, your heal isn't likely to out-aggro 17 other people. And it's only 600 pts total with a full party.
2) Depends on the proc frequency and the cleric's dex. This isn't something to survive by, it's just icing on the cake.
3) Verant has stated the rez percentages, Casters Realms has (http://eq.castersrealm.com/spells/spell.asp?Id=796) and so has every website with cleric spell info. (You can parse the info too)
▲ Page top
wow
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 8:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757996920
91 posts
all i can say is.......wow
▲ Page top
Great weapon!
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 8:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
Since most clerics that would be on a party killing this mob likely already have epics, this is a great weapon to have in hand when not rezzing.

Often if a group is very good, the cleric can jump in to swing at mobs. This would just be icing on the cake during combat. (Doesn't make clerics tanks mind you. And yes our combat skills usually are maxed at around lvl 50)
